=== bd1981-06-12-info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Pine Knob Music Theatre
Clarkston, Michigan
12 June 1981

Dennis-King-Havis-Quebec:
1 Come On In This House (?)
2 It's Gonna Rain (C Johnson)
3 Show Me The Way Lord (?)
4 Saved By The Grace Of Your Love (Willie Smith/David Palmer)
  
5 Gotta Serve Somebody
6 I Believe In You
7 Like A Rolling Stone
8 Till I Get It Right (Red Lane/Larry Henley)
9 Man Gave Names To All The Animals
10 Maggie's Farm
11 Simple Twist Of Fate
12 Fever (Johnny Davenport/Eddie Cooley)
13 Ballad Of A Thin Man
14 Girl From The North Country
15 Dead Man, Dead Man
  
Carolyn Dennis:
16  Walk Around Heaven All Day (Rev. James Cleveland/Cassietta George)

1 Rise Again (Dallas Holm)
2 Mary From The Wild Moor (trad.)
3 Slow Train
4 Lenny Bruce
5 Watered-Down Love
6 Just Like A Woman
7 Solid Rock
8 Forever Young
9 Masters Of War
10 What Can I Do For You?
11 When You Gonna Wake Up
12 In The Garden
13 Blowin' In The Wind
14 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right

Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
Fred Tackett (guitar)
Steve Ripley (guitar)
Willie Smith (keyboards)
Tim Drummond (bass)
Jim Keltner (drums)
Clydie King, Carolyn Dennis, Regina Havis, Madelyn Quebec (background vocals)

further info www.bjorner.com

legendary taper G

cut after Maggie's Farm, Mary From The Wild Moor, What Can I Do For You?, In The Garden

superscope one-point stereo mic -> Sony TC158SD cassette master -> DAT - clone 
   -> (digital transfer) m-audio delta audiophile 2496 -> Wavelab -> ssrc
   -> wavelab, levels raised -> cdwave for tracking -> tlh

I did not harm the sound of the recording in any way



File names & tags edited by Chopen, November 2009
